clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Map office BP readings to equivalent thresholds across different measurement methods (HBPM, ABPM)
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: When converting between office BP, home BP monitoring, and ambulatory BP monitoring readings
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: Cross-reference BP thresholds to determine equivalent hypertension classification across measurement modalities

navigationPath.purpose: Entry point for BP threshold lookup
Show equivalent values for HBPM, daytime/nighttime/24-hour ABPM
Allow user to select alternative measurement method input
Input non-office reading to find equivalent office BP
Display hypertension stage based on selected threshold
Compare multiple office BP thresholds side-by-side
Log threshold mapping to clinical record

validationRules: Office BP must match one of the 4 standard thresholds
Systolic-diastolic pairs must be valid combinations
HBPM values must be consistent with office conversion

rules: Map office BP 120/80 → HBPM 120/80, daytime ABPM 120/80, nighttime ABPM 100/65, 24hr ABPM 115/75
Map office BP 130/80 → HBPM 130/80, daytime ABPM 130/80, nighttime ABPM 110/65, 24hr ABPM 125/75
Map office BP 140/90 → HBPM 135/85, daytime ABPM 135/85, nighttime ABPM 120/70, 24hr ABPM 130/80
Map office BP 160/100 → HBPM 145/90, daytime ABPM 145/90, nighttime ABPM 140/85, 24hr ABPM 145/90
Allow reverse mapping from any measurement method back to office equivalent
Flag inconsistent pairs that don't match known thresholds

appDisplay.screenType: Red alert screen for crisis-level BP regardless of measurement method
appDisplay.behavior: Do not proceed to normal routing

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Use equivalent thresholds to guide treatment decisions based on available measurement method
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: Repeat measurement in 2-4 weeks or based on category
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: Confirm with HBPM or ABPM if office reading is borderline
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: Flag discordance between office and out-of-office readings
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log measurement method and equivalent threshold to health record
